allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = [l for l in data.strip\(\).split\(''\\n''\) if l.strip\(\)] for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''assistant'' and obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''role''\) == ''assistant'': content = obj[''message''].get\(''content'', []\) for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = block[''text''] if len\(text\) > 200: print\(''---ASSISTANT MSG---''\) print\(text[:5000]\) print\(''...''\) except: pass ")
